name: Long-Context Training (4096) + Extended KV Cache Eval (8192)
blurb: Same architecture as current record (11L U-Net, LeakyReLU²+TTT+Muon). Two changes: (1) Train with 4096-token sequences instead of 2048, so the model directly learns positions 0-4095 without NTK scaling. RoPE train_seq_len fixed to match TRAIN_SEQ_LEN. (2) Eval with bf16 extended KV cache (8192-token context) instead of sliding window. Pre-allocated GPU buffer [num_layers, 8192, H, D]; append() is in-place slice write; NTK-aware RoPE scaling for positions 4096-8191. Model trained on long context can exploit the cache at eval.
author: owen
